title: SDE 2 (Full Stack) - 690765
description:

Since its inception in India in 2016, WeWork India has expanded across 68 operational centres in Chennai, New Delhi, Gurugram, Noida, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Pune, and Hyderabad. WeWork India strives to provide customised and curated solutions for various office space needs through its products and solutions. At WeWork India, we’re driven by collaboration, creativity, and a shared vision to redefine the future of work. If you're looking to be part of a dynamic, fast\\-growing organisation that values talent and fosters growth, join us and build your future with WeWork India. For more information, please visit our website https://wework.co.in/
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Full Stack Software Development Engineer 2 (SDE\\-2 Full Stack) specializing in web and backend platform development, you will play a pivotal role in leading the design, development, and piloting of our inaugural state\\-of\\-the\\-art mobile application, driving technical excellence and innovation to deliver best\\-in\\-class solutions to our customers.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable REST APIs and microservices using Node.js (TypeScript/NestJS).

* Optimize bundle size, rendering performance (SSR/SSG), and implement code\\-splitting/lazy loading for fast load times.
* Manage application state with Redux/Context API, MobX or other state\\-management patterns.
* Ensure cross\\-browser compatibility and adherence to WCAG accessibility standards.
* Integrate frontend telemetry for Core Web Vitals monitoring and lighthouse performance.
* Manage cloud infrastructure \\& DevOps workflows (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform) as and when needed.
* Optimize database performance with SQL (MySQL/PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis).
* Help in improving engineering platform activities like setting up logging, monitoring and alerting.
* Identify and fix bugs on both frontend and backend codebases.
* Ensure code quality, security, and best practices via testing, CI/CD, and peer reviews.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams (Product, Design, and AI/ML teams) to ship high\\-impact features.


**Skills And Requirements**
* Bachelor’s degree (B.E/B.Tech) from a top\\-tier institute or equivalent experience.
* 3\\-4 years of experience in full\\-stack development with a strong backend focus.
* Proficiency in Node.jsand NestJS (or Express.js/Fastify with TypeScript).
* React.js, Next.js; strong grasp of modern JS (ES6\\+) and TypeScript.
* CSS, SCSS/SASS, CSS\\-in\\-JS (styled\\-components, Emotion) or utility frameworks (Tailwind).
* Experience with component libraries (MUI, Ant Design) and design\\-system integration.
* Proficiency in responsive design, accessibility (WCAG), and performance optimization (LCP, FID, CLS).Strong experience with SQL databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Redis).
* Experience with ORMs (Sequelize, TypeORM, or Prisma).
* Knowledge of message brokers \\& event\\-driven architecture (RabbitMQ, Kafka, SNS/SQS).
* Familiarity with frontend technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js/Next.js or Angular.js).
* Understanding of scalability and cloud architectures (AWS ECS, EKS, S3, Lambda, CloudWatch, ELK).
* Strong grasp of Git\\-based workflows, CI/CD, and DevOps practices.
* Ability to own projects end\\-to\\-end, work in fast\\-paced startup environments, and have a problem\\-solving mindset.


 Equal Opportunity Employer
   

  

 WeWork India is an Equal Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for our employees and members. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, veteran status or other characteristics protected by law.
   

  

 We expect all employees to embody our values and all aspects of employment including the decisions to hire and promote, are based on merit, competence, performance and business needs.
   

  

 Our total rewards philosophy is aimed at providing compensation that is competitive, performance linked and helps us attract and retain the talent we need to drive our business forward and serve our members. As part of WeWork India, our commitment to you is that you’ll be surrounded by career opportunities in a culture that fosters collaboration, flexibility and inclusion.

title: Web Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Allied Container Group is a prominent logistics and supply chain management company headquartered in Singapore, with a strong presence across the Asia\\-Pacific (APAC) and Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) regions. With nearly five decades of industry experience, we specialize in delivering comprehensive logistics solutions tailored to meet the diverse needs of businesses of all sizes. Our services encompass trucking, container haulage, depot yard operations, warehousing, distribution, and freight forwarding. We pride ourselves on integrating innovative technology into our operations, leveraging a dedicated in\\-house tech team that utilizes artificial intelligence and advanced software development to optimize workflows and develop innovative hardware and software solutions that enhance efficiency and reliability.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a talented and motivated Web Developer to join our Technology \\& Operations team. In this role, you will be responsible for developing, maintaining, and enhancing enterprise web applications that support our operational and business objectives. The ideal candidate will possess a strong foundation in full\\-stack development, with experience in modern frameworks and technologies such as React, Laravel, and related tools. This position offers an exciting opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge solutions that directly impact our logistics operations across multiple regions. The successful candidate will collaborate closely with UI/UX designers, project managers, and operational teams to ensure the delivery of high\\-quality, scalable, and efficient web applications. Additionally, the role involves staying abreast of emerging web development trends and applying innovative techniques to improve system performance and user experience.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should have a minimum of 2 years of hands\\-on experience in full\\-stack web development, particularly with React, Laravel, React Native, HTML, CSS, and related JavaScript/PHP frameworks. Familiarity with databases, version control tools such as Git or SVN, and web server environments like Apache or Nginx is essential. A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or an equivalent qualification, along with relevant work experience, is required. Candidates should demonstrate strong problem\\-solving skills within operational environments and possess a solid understanding of the software development lifecycle. Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines, cloud services such as AWS, Azure, or DigitalOcean, and system testing—automated testing experience is a plus—are highly desirable. Familiarity with OCR frameworks and a keen interest in automation, artificial intelligence, and research to solve complex business challenges will be advantageous. Candidates must also be adaptable to working in a Middle Eastern environment and willing to relocate to Dubai or Oman after the probation period, approximately 12 months.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop, automate, and maintain web applications and services that support our business and operational objectives, ensuring adherence to best practices for performance and code quality.
* Collaborate with team leads and members to gather requirements, define project scope, and ensure timely delivery of solutions.
* Work closely with UI/UX teams to guarantee consistency and excellence in design and user experience.
* Document product specifications, project progress, and technical details to facilitate knowledge sharing and future development.
* Stay updated on the latest trends and technologies in web development, applying relevant innovations to improve system functionality and performance.
* Engage with operational teams, including yard staff, logistics, and accounts, to understand their needs and tailor solutions accordingly.
* Participate in system testing, troubleshooting, and resolving issues independently to ensure seamless operation.
* Contribute to automation initiatives and research projects aimed at enhancing operational efficiency through artificial intelligence and other advanced technologies.


**Benefits**
 Allied Container Group offers a competitive compensation package aligned with industry standards, along with comprehensive benefits including health insurance, paid leave, and opportunities for professional development. Employees will have access to a dynamic work environment that encourages innovation and continuous learning. The company promotes a collaborative culture, providing exposure to diverse projects and regional markets. For candidates willing to relocate, there are opportunities for international assignments in Dubai or Oman after successful completion of the initial probation period. We also support work\\-life balance initiatives and foster an inclusive workplace where all employees can thrive and contribute to our collective success.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Allied Container Group is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering an inclusive environment where diversity is celebrated and all individuals are treated with respect and fairness. We do not discriminate based on race, gender, age, religion, nationality, disability, or any other protected characteristic. Our hiring practices are designed to provide equal employment opportunities and ensure that every candidate has a fair chance to contribute to our organization’s growth and success.

title: Quality Assurance Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Biorev Studios is a leading 3D rendering studio dedicated to delivering high\\-quality visual content for a diverse range of industries including architecture, real estate, product design, and entertainment. Our innovative approach combines cutting\\-edge technology with creative expertise to produce stunning visualizations that meet the unique needs of our clients. With a global presence and a commitment to excellence, Biorev Studios strives to set new standards in the 3D rendering industry. Our team is composed of talented professionals who are passionate about pushing the boundaries of visual storytelling and technical precision. We foster a collaborative and dynamic work environment where creativity and quality are at the forefront of everything we do. As part of our continued growth, we are seeking dedicated individuals to join our team and contribute to our mission of delivering exceptional visual solutions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and detail\\-oriented Senior Manual QA Engineer to join our team at Biorev Studios in Mohali, Sector 67, India. This in\\-office position requires a proactive professional capable of taking full ownership of quality assurance processes across our web applications. The ideal candidate will be responsible for end\\-to\\-end testing, documentation, release validation, and basic coordination with developers. This role is not intended for training purposes; rather, it demands someone who can independently drive QA activities from day one, ensuring the highest standards of quality for our digital products. Working closely with development teams, the Senior Manual QA Engineer will play a critical role in maintaining and enhancing the reliability and performance of our web\\-based platforms built on React.js, Three.js, and Laravel.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess 3 to 5 years of experience in manual QA, specifically with web applications. Essential qualifications include a strong understanding of functional testing, regression testing, and UI/UX validation. Proficiency in bug tracking tools such as Jira and GitHub is required, along with excellent documentation skills. The candidate must demonstrate a keen eye for detail, ownership mindset, and the ability to work independently without supervision. Effective communication skills and responsiveness are crucial to coordinate seamlessly with developers and ensure timely delivery of quality products. A solid technical background in testing web applications built on modern frameworks like React.js and Laravel will be advantageous.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The core responsibilities of this role encompass:
   

  

* Performing comprehensive manual testing including functional, regression, UI, and exploratory testing on web applications built with React.js, Three.js, and Laravel.
* Validating APIs, user flows, and edge cases to ensure robustness and reliability of the application.
* Creating, maintaining, and updating detailed test cases, test plans, bug reports, and regression suites to guarantee thorough test coverage across features.
* Tracking bugs with clarity, providing step\\-by\\-step reproduction, screenshots, and severity levels, then collaborating with developers to facilitate swift bug resolution.
* Re\\-testing and validating fixes to confirm issues are resolved before release.
* Coordinating with developers to ensure release readiness, tracking feature statuses, and providing daily updates on QA progress.
* Identifying potential risks or issues during the testing phase and reporting them proactively to mitigate impact on releases.


**Benefits**
 Joining Biorev Studios as a Senior Manual QA Engineer offers numerous benefits, including the opportunity to be the sole point of quality control for our web applications, providing high visibility to your work. You will have the chance to make a direct impact on product quality and release success, fostering a sense of ownership and accomplishment. The role provides a collaborative environment with access to modern tools and technologies, along with competitive compensation packages. We also support professional growth through continuous learning opportunities and exposure to innovative projects in the 3D rendering industry. Additionally, our in\\-office setup in Mohali provides a convenient and resource\\-rich workspace designed for productivity and creativity.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Biorev Studios is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, gender, age, religion, national origin, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diversity enhances our creativity and innovation, and we are dedicated to providing an equitable environment where all employees can thrive and contribute to our collective success.

title: Engineering Manager, Google One, Growth Infrastructure
description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 8 years of experience with software development in one or more programming languages (e.g., Python, C, C\\+\\+, Java, JavaScript).
* 3 years of experience in a technical leadership role; overseeing projects, with 2 years of experience in a people management, supervision/team leadership role.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Master's degree or PhD in computer science or a related technical field.
* 3 years of experience working in a changing organization.
* Experience coding with Java, TypeScript, APIs, and databases.


**About The Job**
 Like Google's own ambitions, the work of a Software Engineer goes beyond just Search. Software Engineering Managers have not only the technical expertise to take on and provide technical leadership to major projects, but also manage a team of Engineers. You not only optimize your own code but make sure Engineers are able to optimize theirs. As a Software Engineering Manager you manage your project goals, contribute to product strategy and help develop your team. Teams work all across the company, in areas such as information retrieval, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, distributed computing, large\\-scale system design, networking, security, data compression, user interface design; the list goes on and is growing every day. Operating with scale and speed, our exceptional software engineers are just getting started \\-\\- and as a manager, you guide the way.
   

  

 With technical and leadership expertise, you manage engineers across multiple teams and locations, a large product budget and oversee the deployment of large\\-scale projects across multiple sites internationally.
   

  

 The Platforms and Devices team encompasses Google's various computing software platforms across environments (desktop, mobile, applications), as well as our first party devices and services that combine the best of Google AI, software, and hardware. Teams across this area research, design, and develop new technologies to make our user's interaction with computing faster and more seamless, building innovative experiences for our users around the world.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Manage a team of engineers.
* Drive projects and provide technical leadership to inspire teams to innovate, design, and implement user facing capabilities for account foundation, growth engine campaign experiences.
* Build and scale infrastructure to enable sign up experience changes. Partner and collaborate with engineering teams across multiple Google product areas, product, and program management teams.
* Work with partner teams and product managers in developing a long\\-term technology roadmap.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. title: Data Scientist- Machine Learning
description:
**Location: Remote**
**Contract Role**
**Machine Learning Engineer** 
 to help design, train, and deploy large\\-scale learning systems powering autonomous AI agents for its AI lab partner. This role is ideal for engineers passionate about building models that think, adapt, and perform complex tasks in real\\-world environments. You'll be working at the intersection of ML research, systems engineering, and AI agent behavior — transforming ideas into robust, scalable learning pipelines.
   

  

**You're a Great Fit If You**
* Have a strong background in machine learning, deep learning, or reinforcement learning.
* Are proficient in Python and familiar with frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, or JAX.
* Understand training infrastructure, including distributed training, GPUs/TPUs, and data pipeline optimization.
* Can implement end\\-to\\-end ML systems, from preprocessing and feature extraction to training, evaluation, and deployment.
* Are comfortable with MLOps tools (e.g., Weights \\& Biases, MLflow, Docker, Kubernetes, or Airflow).
* Have experience designing custom architectures or adapting LLMs, diffusion models, or transformer\\-based systems.
* Think critically about model performance, generalization, and bias, and can measure results through data\\-driven experimentation.
* Are curious about AI agents and how models can simulate human\\-like reasoning, problem\\-solving, and collaboration.


**Primary Goal Of This Role**
 To develop, optimize, and deploy machine learning systems that enhance agent performance, learning efficiency, and adaptability. You'll design model architectures, training workflows, and evaluation pipelines that push the frontier of autonomous intelligence and real\\-time reasoning.
